goal: Promote live verify from optional evidence to a policy-enforced repository gate.
successCriteria: PR-blocking versus nightly-only probes are explicitly separated.
verify gate can fail deterministically when required live evidence is missing.
verification report can reference gate outcomes without manual patch-up.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding brand-new cloud probes beyond the current validated matrix.
Adopting a merge queue implementation in the same package.
